title: Emissive End Portal
description: Make End Portal like in Minecraft Dungeons
body:
Improves the texture of the end portal, making it look like in minecraft dungeons. Adds glow to the portal's edges.
Works on all versions above 26.1-snapshot-7!

End portal from resource pack

![end portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b8cb6e3f89e3cdbb3c3809f19a1dd520f64bf54_0.webp)

End portal from Minecraft Dungeons

![Dungeons end portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323c224b80858fbbc7b04483e5ec683fcf8a9094_0.webp)
